CustomField.description: The date the income was certified. Auto-fills when you click the Certify Income button. Before certifying, verify that you have entered all available information on the applicants.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The date the income was certified. Auto-fills when you click the Certify Income button. Before certifying, verify that you have entered all available information on the applicants.
CustomField.label: Income Certification Date
